character.definition: anger; rage; angry, (same as 戾) recalcitrant; stubbornly persisting in doing something wrong; cruel; despotic
draw the feet up; to refuse to advance, to summarize; to gather; to collect, name of an old country, (same as 鍐) a headstall; ornament on a bridle; (Cant.) to jump up
to look suddenly; to look shortly
ugly, ghost; evil spirits; bogy; goblin; demons and monsters
pearl that is not quite round
cord binding on hilt of sword
minced and salted fish; a place in Sichuan
thin wafers in which meat and other foods are rolled and eaten
